name: Kriti Sharma
flavor: Decides fast, ships faster, eats everything in between.
bio: PM at Yulu who'd rather build it than debate it. Equal parts sneakerhead, foodie, and shipper. Leads the AI PM Workshop and believes the best spec is a working prototype.

moves.name: Decisive Strike
moves.description: Ends the loop and locks the call. No more 'let's circle back.'

moves.name: Ship Sprint
moves.description: Goes from idea to live product before the meeting ends.
